title: Heinekenia eremitica
taxonomy: Heinekenia eremitica is classified as a species of sea snail within the family Cancellariidae. This family is part of the larger order of Neogastropoda. The Neogastropoda order belongs to the class Gastropoda, which includes a wide variety of snail species. The Gastropoda class is further grouped into the phylum Mollusca. Mollusca is a diverse phylum that also includes clams, mussels, oysters, squids, and octopuses.
